name: Passport (international)
description: International travel passport, any issuing country. Covers the biographical data page (page 2 / photo page).
extraction_prompt: Extract all personal identification and travel document fields from this passport image. Return JSON with all fields including MRZ lines if visible.

document_type.instruction: Type of document as printed (e.g., PASSPORT, P)

document_number.instruction: Passport number exactly as printed on the document

issuing_country.instruction: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of issuing country (e.g., GBR, LTU, USA)

surname.instruction: Surname / last name in uppercase as printed on the document

given_names.instruction: Given name(s) / first name(s) in uppercase as printed on the document

sex.instruction: Gender normalised to M or F (e.g., M, F, MALE → M, FEMALE → F, VYR. → M, MOT. → F)

nationality.instruction: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of holder's nationality (e.g., GBR, RUS, LTU)

date_of_birth.instruction: Date of birth converted to YYYY-MM-DD format from any printed date format

date_of_expiry.instruction: Expiry / valid until date converted to YYYY-MM-DD format

date_of_issue.instruction: Issue / date of issue converted to YYYY-MM-DD format if present on document

mrz_line_1.instruction: Machine Readable Zone line 1 verbatim (44 characters including < padding). If not visible return null.

mrz_line_2.instruction: Machine Readable Zone line 2 verbatim (44 characters including < padding). If not visible return null.
